content:
### Vortice update
- Only 24h something overdue, I've pushed vortices wheels, the ryker event wheel, and some skill scaling for vortices db page.
https://dansa.github.io/SKeyDB/#/database/awk/vortice/cards
I'll try to do the work faster next time C:

- **Tiny disclaimer** the ingame export/import is currently COOKED to for wheels after the last game update. Covenants and Posses should all work now, but a lot of the wheels are mapped wrong due to a change they made. God knows why really, it is what it is for now, expect missing/incorrect wheels when using the @@ codes. Sorry!
😭 does this mean i have to remap all the wheels again
I really hope not. I am inquiring elsewhere for some assistance q_q

Also i forgot to add this to the note here as well but;
https://dansa.github.io/SKeyDB/#/timeline <:pray:1356053116260454534>
if you give me until this upcoming weekend i can just get them all then
